sourcesContent:
export const propertiesData = [
  // ============ RESIDENTIAL - ONGOING PROJECTS ============
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Sunrise Heights Luxury Apartments",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Apartment",
    status: "ongoing",
    price: 4500000,
    location: "Panchavati, Nashik",
    description: `Premium 2 & 3 BHK apartments in Panchavati with modern amenities.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560448204-e02f11c3d0e2?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 3,
    area_sqft: 1450,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Saffron Heights",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Apartment",
    status: "ongoing",
    price: 5200000,
    location: "Gangapur Road, Nashik",
    description: `Premium apartments with modern amenities.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580587771525-78b9dba3b914?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 3,
    area_sqft: 1350,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: false
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "PG Complex Nashik",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "Paying Guest",
    status: "ongoing",
    price: 12000,
    location: "College Road, Nashik",
    description: `Fully furnished PG for students and professionals.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554995207-c18c203602cb?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 0,
    area_sqft: 500,
    reraVerified: false,
    governmentVerified: false
  },

  // ============ RESIDENTIAL - COMPLETED PROJECTS ============
  {
    id: "4",
    title: "Green Valley Independent House",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Independent House",
    status: "completed",
    price: 8500000,
    location: "College Road, Nashik",
    description: `Beautiful independent house with garden and terrace.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560185127-6ed189bf02f4?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 4,
    area_sqft: 2200,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "5",
    title: "Green Valley Villas",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Villa",
    status: "completed",
    price: 12000000,
    location: "College Road, Nashik",
    description: `Luxury villas with private garden.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1613490493576-7fde63acd811?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 4,
    area_sqft: 2200,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "6",
    title: "Business Plaza",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Office Space",
    status: "completed",
    price: 15000000,
    location: "CBD, Nashik",
    description: `Premium office space in heart of CBD.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 1500,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },

  // ============ RESIDENTIAL - UPCOMING PROJECTS ============
  {
    id: "7",
    title: "Riverdale Farmhouses",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Farmhouse",
    status: "upcoming",
    price: 18000000,
    location: "Gangapur Road, Nashik",
    description: `Luxury farmhouses with private gardens. Launching soon.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500076656116-558758c991c1?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 3,
    area_sqft: 3500,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "8",
    title: "Luxury Villa Project",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Villa",
    status: "upcoming",
    price: 25000000,
    location: "Gangapur Road, Nashik",
    description: `Premium luxury villas with private pool. Coming soon.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1613490493576-7fde63acd811?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 5,
    area_sqft: 4000,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },

  // ============ COMMERCIAL - ONGOING ============
  {
    id: "9",
    title: "Industrial Warehouse",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Lease",
    propertyType: "Warehouse",
    status: "ongoing",
    price: 500000,
    location: "Ambad, Nashik",
    description: `Large warehouse for storage and logistics. Under construction.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586528116311-ad8dd3c8310d?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 10000,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "10",
    title: "Mall Retail Spaces",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "Shop/Showroom",
    status: "ongoing",
    price: 45000,
    location: "CBD, Nashik",
    description: `Prime retail spaces in upcoming mall.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 500,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },

  // ============ COMMERCIAL - COMPLETED ============
  {
    id: "11",
    title: "Retail Showroom MG Road",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Sale",
    propertyType: "Shop/Showroom",
    status: "completed",
    price: 8500000,
    location: "MG Road, Nashik",
    description: `Prime retail showroom on MG Road. Ready to move.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 800,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "12",
    title: "IT Park Office Space",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Lease",
    propertyType: "Office Space",
    status: "completed",
    price: 600000,
    location: "Ambad, Nashik",
    description: `Fully furnished office space in IT park.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 1200,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },

  // ============ COMMERCIAL - UPCOMING ============
  {
    id: "13",
    title: "ATM Spaces on Rent",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "ATM Space",
    status: "upcoming",
    price: 15000,
    location: "Multiple Locations, Nashik",
    description: `Compact spaces ideal for ATM machines. Launching soon.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1526304640581-d334cdbbf45e?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 100,
    reraVerified: false,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "14",
    title: "Coworking Space Project",
    category: "Commercial",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "Office Space",
    status: "upcoming",
    price: 35000,
    location: "CBD, Nashik",
    description: `Modern coworking space. Launching soon. Pre-booking open.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=800"],
    area_sqft: 2000,
    reraVerified: true,
    governmentVerified: true
  },

  // ============ RENTAL PROPERTIES ============
  {
    id: "15",
    title: "2 BHK Flat for Rent",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "Apartment",
    status: "completed",
    price: 25000,
    location: "Panchavati, Nashik",
    description: `Well-maintained 2 BHK flat available for rent.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522708323590-d24dbb6b0267?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 2,
    area_sqft: 950,
    reraVerified: false,
    governmentVerified: true
  },
  {
    id: "16",
    title: "Studio Apartment for Rent",
    category: "Residential",
    listingType: "Rent",
    propertyType: "Apartment",
    status: "completed",
    price: 15000,
    location: "Indira Nagar, Nashik",
    description: `Compact studio apartment perfect for bachelors.`,
    images: ["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560448204-e02f11c3d0e2?w=800"],
    bedrooms: 1,
    area_sqft: 550,
    reraVerified: false,
    governmentVerified: false
  }
];

export const getFilterOptions = () => {
  return {
    categories: ['All', 'Residential', 'Commercial'],
    listingTypes: ['All', 'Sale', 'Rent', 'Lease'],
    propertyTypes: {
      Residential: ['All', 'Apartment', 'Independent House', 'Villa', 'Farmhouse', 'Paying Guest'],
      Commercial: ['All', 'Office Space', 'Shop/Showroom', 'Warehouse', 'ATM Space']
    }
  };
};
